scenarios.description: clone() deep-copies custom child nodes: modifying clone’s root children does not affect original
scenarios.precondition: Document original has custom child Elements under root
scenarios.expectedResult: clone has independent children list; original remains unchanged when clone is mutated
pseudocode: TEST TC05 clone deep-copies custom children
// Mutate clone's children: remove and add new element
// Original still has its 'div' child and no 'span'

scenarios.description: clone() on an empty Document yields an independent document with no child nodes
scenarios.precondition: Document original is newly created via Document(String,String) with no appended children
scenarios.expectedResult: clone has no children and is a distinct instance
